response.original_title: How Do I Dispute a Charge on Gemini? – Process, Steps & FAQs
response.overview: How Do I Dispute a Charge on Gemini? – Process, Steps & FAQs Many users ask, “How do I dispute a charge on Gemini?” 🙏 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ when they notice an unauthorized, incorrect, or unexpected transaction ✔️🙏 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ . On Gemini, disputes depend on whether the charge is related to fiat deposits, card payments, or crypto transactions. 🙏 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ Since crypto transfers are usually irreversible, the dispute process mainly applies to card purchases, failed deposits, or billing errors. Google Snippet (Featured Answer) How do I dispute a charge on Gemini? To dispute a🙏 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║  charge on Gemini, users must review the transaction, contact support through the help center, and submit a formal dispute request ✔️🙏 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [574]↳ [7167] ║ . Disputes are typically only accepted for fiat or card-related transactions, not confirmed blockchain transfers. Acting quickly improves the chance of resolution.
